entities.name: PICSA
entities.description: Participatory Integrated Climate Services for Agriculture approach designed to improve farmers' livelihood and resilience against climate change

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF READING
entities.description: The academic institution that designed the PICSA approach

entities.name: FARMER LIVELIHOOD
entities.description: The overall well-being and economic stability of farmers

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of farmers to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: CLIMATE AND WEATHER INFORMATION
entities.description: Locally specific and accurate data provided to farmers to inform their agricultural decisions

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants used as options for livelihood activities

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals used as options for livelihood activities

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY PLANNING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used within the PICSA approach to improve farmer decision making

entities.name: DECISION MAKING
entities.description: The process by which farmers choose livelihood activities based on their individual situations

entities.name: FIELD EXTENSIONISTS
entities.description: Agricultural professionals who implement the PICSA approach and support farmers

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the PICSA approach was piloted

entities.name: AFRICA RISING PROJECT
entities.description: The project framework within which the PICSA approach was implemented

entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The specific geographical area in Mali where the project intervention occurred
